economic_notes: GBEs include Nuxalk Business Trust (100%), Nunumus Management Group (100%), and Bella Coola Hotel / 0820770 B.C. Ltd. (100%). Financial information for GBEs was not available for the year end, resulting in a qualification. BC Gaming cash balance of $3,545,627 noted.
notes: Audit is qualified on three grounds: (1) Social Housing TCA amortized at CMHC-required rate rather than useful life per PSAS; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not yet assessed as of audit report date (April 10, 2025); (3) GBE financial information unavailable for both 2024 and 2023. Three subsidiaries fully consolidated: Nuxalk Acwsalcmalslayc Academy of Learning Society, Nuxalk Nation Property Management, Nuxalk Nation Transition House Society. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method with no income recorded in 2024. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $24,728,683 + FNHA $4,143,726 + Province of BC $6,394,857 + Fisheries and Oceans $743,442 + Vancouver Coastal Health $1,416,855 + FNESC $2,829,289 + CMHC $49,994 + Mid Coast First Nations Training Society $187,400 + Coast Opportunity Funds $39,820 = $40,533,266 (rounded to $40,533,246 per revenue line totals). OSR includes interest, rental revenue, and other contracts/government funding income not attributable to identified government sources.
